{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Rune Queen’s array
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] used a working of the [[Rune Queen’s array]] to slow [[Yushi]]'s time.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
